name: Bluebeam AEC Document Management API
what_it_does: Bluebeam REST API for AEC (Architecture, Engineering, Construction) PDF collaboration and document management platform. Enables AI agents to manage project document sessions (Studio), handle PDF markup and annotation workflows, access document version and revision history, retrieve comment and review data, manage project team access and permissions, integrate with project management and BIM platforms, automate document distribution and review workflows, and connect AEC document data with construction management systems.
use_cases: Managing construction document review sessions from project coordination agents
Accessing PDF markup and annotation data from quality review agents
Distributing project documents for review from document workflow agents
Integrating Bluebeam Studio sessions with project management tools from PM integration agents
not_for: Non-AEC document management without PDF markup and construction workflow focus
General PDF processing without collaborative AEC review workflows
Legal document management without AEC project context
best_when: An architecture firm, engineering company, or construction manager using Bluebeam wants AI agents to automate document distribution, review session management, markup tracking, and project document workflows.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Construction project documents include proprietary designs, specifications, and pricing that are confidential. Document access control is critical — unauthorized access to construction drawings has IP and liability implications.

auth.notes: Bluebeam uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. User-level credentials with project and document scopes. Developer portal with API documentation. Studio Prime API for enterprise Studio session management. Acquired by Nemetschek Group 2014. Webhooks for document and review events.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — AEC enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual per-user pricing; Basics, Core, Complete plans
pricing.notes: Pasadena, California. Founded 2002. Acquired by Nemetschek 2014. Used by 3M+ construction and engineering professionals. Strong AEC market penetration. Industry standard for construction document collaboration. Studio is the real-time collaboration feature. Competes with Procore Docs and Autodesk BIM 360 for AEC document management.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Construction drawings and specifications are proprietary — access control critical
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API with developer portal
Studio sessions are real-time collaboration — API access to live sessions has timing constraints
PDF markup data includes annotations with user attribution — handle authorship data carefully
Nemetschek parent — API roadmap aligned with broader Nemetschek AEC portfolio (Vectorworks, Archicad)
Large PDF file handling — document upload/download agents must handle large file transfers
agent_readiness.security_notes: AEC project documents with proprietary designs. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU data residency. Construction IP protection critical.

security_score_components.security_notes: AEC project documents. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU data residency. Proprietary design IP protection.
